Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A new C++ back end for ocamlc 215 upvotes, 18 comments
  2. Fast and Gorgeous Erosion Filter 203 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 308 upvotes, 42 comments
  4. Lemonade by AMD: a fast and open source local LLM server using GPU and NPU 166 upvotes, 30 comments
  5. Order and Tension 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Email obfuscation: What works in 2026? 229 upvotes, 70 comments
  7. Inside Nepal's Fake Rescue Racket 101 upvotes, 27 comments
  8. Quantum computing bombshells that are not April Fools 222 upvotes, 72 comments
  9. Emacs-libgterm: Terminal emulator for Emacs using libghostty-vt 34 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. ReactOS Shows Improved Stability and 64-Bit Support at Chemnitz Linux Days 2026 36 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise LiteLLM 92 upvotes, 30 comments
  12. LinkedIn Is Illegally Searching Your Computer 390 upvotes, 174 comments
  13. Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March 557 upvotes, 260 comments
  14. Built a cheap DIY fan controller because my motherboard never had working PWM 50 upvotes, 16 comments
  15. New laws to make it easier to cancel subscriptions and get refunds 107 upvotes, 49 comments
  16. Bringing Clojure programming to Enterprise (2021) 112 upvotes, 53 comments
  17. Gone (Almost) Phishin' 96 upvotes, 45 comments
  18. Sweden goes back to basics, swapping screens for books in the classroom 316 upvotes, 176 comments
  19. Enabling Codex to Analyze Two Decades of Hacker News Data 30 upvotes, 10 comments
  20. Significant Raise of Reports 107 upvotes, 57 comments
  21. IBM Announces Strategic Collaboration with Arm 178 upvotes, 106 comments
  22. Subscription bombing and how to mitigate it 225 upvotes, 147 comments
  23. EmDash – A spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 622 upvotes, 463 comments
  24. Artemis II Launch Day Updates 1000 upvotes, 869 comments
  25. 'Backrooms' and the Rise of the Institutional Gothic 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market 548 upvotes, 479 comments
  27. Reinventing the Pull Request 43 upvotes, 30 comments
  28. Show HN: I built a DNS resolver from scratch in Rust – no DNS libraries 28 upvotes, 20 comments
  29. Trap a quantum object in a box – is it hard or soft, or is it black or white? 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. Telli (YC F24) is hiring engineers, designers, and more (on-site, Berlin) 0 upvotes, 0 comments
